channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: US inflation jumps to two-year high as Iran war ripples across economy

item.title: AI spending will boost productivity — but first it’ll make even the most efficient firms look like slackers
item.description: <![CDATA[AI spending will boost productivity — but first it’ll make even the most efficient firms look like slackers]]>

item.title: Why has the UK economy been so badly hit by the Iran war?
item.description: <![CDATA[Why has the UK economy been so badly hit by the Iran war?]]>

item.title: Software stocks are getting pulverized — but bitcoin’s rebound hints that a bottom might be in

item.title: Cyber security stocks fall on worries over Anthropic’s advanced AI tool
